title_en: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Sparks Online Ticket Madness as Official Rating and Wild IMAX Camera Popcorn Bucket Are Unveiled
summary_en: Director Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey has been rated “R” by the Motion Picture Association, which means filmgoers under the age of 17 will be required to have a parent or guardian accompany them when screening the film.
body_en:
Director Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey has been rated “R” by the Motion Picture Association, which means filmgoers under the age of 17 will be required to have a parent or guardian accompany them when screening the film.
As Variety points out, most of Nolan’s other summer movies, such as his Dark Knight trilogy, earned PG-13 ratings, although an R rating didn’t prevent Oppenheimer from earning over $330 million at the domestic box office.
The trade also reports that audience demand for premium format tickets such as IMAX 70mm “appears to be so high that AMC‘s ticketing app paused briefly . Sales have resumed, but wait times are up to an hour. … Fandango’s website also appeared to be dragging with users experiencing long wait times.”
The Odyssey is the first film in history – and one of Nolan’s longest movies – to be shot entirely in IMAX, a milestone commemorated by the movie’s official popcorn bucket, which is in the shape of an IMAX camera.
The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Anne Hathaway, Tom Holland, Robert Pattinson, Zendaya, Lupita Nyong’o, Charlize Theron, and Jon Bernthal.
For more on Nolan’s Homeric epic, find out how The Odyssey “almost saved” Spider-Man: Brand New Day , read Lupita Nyong’o’s response to the criticism of her casting as Helen of Troy , and Nolan’s defense of his film’s historical accuracy following online complaints.
The Odyssey opens in theaters on July 17th.
paragraphs_en: Director Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey has been rated “R” by the Motion Picture Association, which means filmgoers under the age of 17 will be required to have a parent or guardian accompany them when screening the film.

As Variety points out, most of Nolan’s other summer movies, such as his Dark Knight trilogy, earned PG-13 ratings, although an R rating didn’t prevent Oppenheimer from earning over $330 million at the domestic box office.

The trade also reports that audience demand for premium format tickets such as IMAX 70mm “appears to be so high that AMC‘s ticketing app paused briefly . Sales have resumed, but wait times are up to an hour. … Fandango’s website also appeared to be dragging with users experiencing long wait times.”

The Odyssey is the first film in history – and one of Nolan’s longest movies – to be shot entirely in IMAX, a milestone commemorated by the movie’s official popcorn bucket, which is in the shape of an IMAX camera.
The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Anne Hathaway, Tom Holland, Robert Pattinson, Zendaya, Lupita Nyong’o, Charlize Theron, and Jon Bernthal.

The Odyssey opens in theaters on July 17th.
